headline: Assessing Freeport-McMoRan (FCX) Valuation After A Powerful Year Of Shareholder Returns
summary: Why Freeport-McMoRan is on investors’ radar today Freeport-McMoRan (FCX) is back in focus after a recent stretch of strong stock performance, with total return over the past year sitting at 95.63% and month return at 7.62%. For anyone tracking large materials names, that kind of move naturally raises questions about what is already reflected in the share price and how the company’s current fundamentals, including US$25.9b in revenue and US$2.2b in net income, line up with it. See our latest...
